The '''Solonar Rangers''' were a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They used a [[Color/Legends|blue]] and yellow color scheme on their uniforms and vehicles.
